title: 6D/5N The Best of Avatar Experience Zhangjiajie and Changsha
details: Experience the breathtaking landscapes of Zhangjiajie and Changsha with a perfect blend of city and nature tours. Visit the famous Avatar Scenic Area, Tianmen Mountain, Glass Skywalk, and cultural highlights while enjoying comfortable hotels, guided tours, and seamless transfers.

itinerary.day_details: Meet at NAIA Terminal 3 for airline check-in and boarding. Flight details: CZ3078 MNL–CAN 08:20–10:50, CZ3388 CAN–CSX 16:55–18:30. Arrival at Changsha Airport, meet tour guide, transfer to hotel for check-in. Dinner and overnight in Changsha.

After breakfast, drive to Zhangjiajie. Visit Avatar Scenic Area including No.1 Bridge and Avatar Hallelujah Mountain. Enjoy breathtaking views from the platform (up and down via Bailong Elevator). Hotel check-in and overnight in Zhangjiajie.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/6D/5N The Best of Avatar Experience Zhangjiajie and Changsha/Day2_1769584326.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, tour Golden Whip Stream (Four Gates). Visit Grand Canyon Cliffs Glass Bridge. Explore Namenkou Food Street and Dayong Town, composed of unique traditional buildings. Visit Zhangjiajie 72 Strange Floors. Shopping stop at Chinese Medicine Shop (2 hours). Hotel check-in and overnight in Zhangjiajie.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/6D/5N The Best of Avatar Experience Zhangjiajie and Changsha/Day3_1769584301.png

itinerary.day_details: After breakfast, visit Junsheng Sandstone Painting Museum. Tour Tianmen Mountain including Cable Car Ride, Glass Skywalk, and Tianmen Hole. Jewelry shopping stop (2 hours). Transfer to Changsha, hotel check-in, and overnight in Changsha.

After breakfast, visit Orange Island (including battery car). Enjoy free time shopping at Huangxinglu Pedestrian Street and Changsha IFS. Explore Pozi Food Street and Wuyi Square on your own. Overnight in Changsha.
itinerary.day_image: assets/data/packages/asia/6D/5N The Best of Avatar Experience Zhangjiajie and Changsha/Day5_1769584305.png

itinerary.day_details: Early transfer to airport. Flight details: CZ3387 CSX–CAN 08:00–09:40, CZ0397 CAN–MNL 13:55–16:45. Arrival in Manila. Home sweet home.

inclusions: Roundtrip airfare via China Southern Airlines
5 nights hotel accommodation in 4–5 star hotels
Meals as indicated in the itinerary
Sightseeing tours as specified in the itinerary
Free travel insurance up to 1.5M coverage
extra_details: Mode of Payment: ₱12,000 first down payment to reserve slots; ₱12,000 second down payment after one month; full payment 45 days before travel period.
